company.name: Knowledgepie Private Limited
company.tagline: Imaging the Future — Safer MRI Contrast for Better Diagnosis

seo.title: Knowledgepie | Safer MRI Contrast Agents
seo.description: Knowledgepie is a biotechnology company developing safer nanoparticle-based MRI contrast agents. Xeuj® — a patented, NSF-free alternative for renal impaired patients.
seo.keywords: Knowledgepie, MRI contrast agent, Xeuj, nanoparticle contrast, safer MRI, renal impaired contrast, GBCA alternative, NSF-free, biotech India, Make in India contrast agent

founder.name: Dr. Madhulekha Gogoi
founder.title: Director & Co-founder
bio: An innovator, best described as a scientist, Madhulekha is committed to make a difference in people's life by her scientific and personal endeavors.

She started her research journey with a mission 'to find a better diagnostic tool to detect cancer in early stage'. She is a nanotechnologist by training with a fascination for biology. Her research has been well cited. After actively pursuing research at the institutes of International repute, she cofounded Knowledgepie Pvt. Ltd. with the BIG grant received from BIRAC, DBT. She wants to translate her ideas and research from bench to hospital, to make an impact in oncology and to make significant contribution to the global fight against cancer.

Dr. Madhulekha Gogoi has received PhD from Tezpur University and then did two post docs in IIT Guwahati and CSIR NEIST, Jorhat. She has published 11 papers in international journals and three book chapters till now. She has acquired two copyrights and one Indian patent granted (Ref no. 351940). She is the recipient of BIRAC BIG grant, DST Women Scientist Fellowship, DST National Post Doctoral Fellowship, DST Nanomission Post Doctoral Fellowship, DST INSPIRE Fellowship and gold medal in MSc in Nanoscience and Technology from Tezpur University, in 2008.

members.name: Mr. Aditya Man Borborah
members.bio: Mr. Borborah is a B.Tech graduate from NIT Silchar and holds an MBA from NIT Trichy. He is an ex-employee of TCS with more than 10 years of experience in IT skills and management.

members.name: Ms. Rituporna Borgohain
members.bio: Ms. Borgohain holds a BCA and an MBA and is currently involved in business development and organizational growth initiatives.

members.name: Ms. Anusuya Dutta
members.bio: Ms. Dutta holds an M.Sc. in Chemistry and is currently involved in product synthesis and development.

advisors.name: Dr. Ilias Ali
advisors.affiliation: LHB Industries, St Louis, Missouri, United States

advisors.name: Dr. Samiron Phukan
advisors.affiliation: Aragen Life Sciences, Hyderabad, Telangana, India

usps.title: First Indigenous Contrast Agent
usps.description: India's first 'Make in India' contrast agent, reducing import dependence and advancing healthcare innovation.

usps.title: Eco-Friendly Synthesis
usps.description: Developed using a green, aqueous, thermo-free, one-pot process, ensuring sustainability with minimal environmental impact.

usps.title: NSF-Free & Safer
usps.description: Iron-based formulation eliminates the risk of Nephrogenic Systemic Fibrosis (NSF) associated with gadolinium-based contrast agents.

usps.title: Safe for Renal Patients
usps.description: Designed for kidney-impaired patients, providing a safer alternative to conventional gadolinium-based agents.

uniqueness.title: Environment Friendly
uniqueness.description: It is produced using a green route, which means it is environmentally friendly and has minimal impact on the ecosystem.

uniqueness.title: Advantages related to NSF
uniqueness.description: As an iron-based agent, it carries no risk of nephrogenic systemic fibrosis (NSF) unlike Gd-based contrast agents (GBCAs).

uniqueness.title: First 'Make In India' Product
uniqueness.description: Will be 'First to market' 'Make in India' product in contrast agent market.
